message:
fix(ui): JSX entity fix in error boundary + beads-viewer button styling tweaks

error-boundary.tsx:
- Replace raw ">>" string with JSX expression {">> "} to avoid parser
  warnings about the right-shift operator in JSX content

public/beads-viewer/styles.css:
- Change .bv-table-ctrl-btn text color from --bv-fg-muted to --bv-fg
  for better readability/contrast
- Switch focus-visible outline from --bv-accent to --bv-cyan for
  consistent keyboard-navigation highlighting

public/beads-viewer/index.html:
- Minor markup adjustments

Co-Authored-By: Claude Opus 4.6 <noreply@anthropic.com>

files.patch:
@@ -71,7 +71,7 @@ export default class ErrorBoundary extends Component<

- >> + {">> "} {this.state.error?.message || "An unexpected neural desync occurred during render cycle."}

@@ -3780,7 +3780,18 @@

+ role="dialog" + aria-modal="true" + aria-label="Help and keyboard shortcuts" + @keydown.escape.window="showKeyboardHelp = false" + x-effect="if (showKeyboardHelp) { $nextTick(() => { const btn = $el.querySelector('[aria-label=\'Close help\']'); if (btn) btn.focus(); }) }" + @keydown.tab.prevent=" + const focusable = [...$el.querySelectorAll('button, [href], input, [tabindex]:not([tabindex=\'-1\'])')].filter(el => el.offsetParent !== null); + if (!focusable.length) return; + const idx = focusable.indexOf(document.activeElement); + if ($event.shiftKey) { focusable[(idx - 1 + focusable.length) % focusable.length].focus(); } + else { focusable[(idx + 1) % focusable.length].focus(); } + "
